what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that links attachment att-e6b68956 in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-03672d3f as a board_items attachment.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of board_items.
The target is a board URI: board://item-03672d3f.
It is scoped to the dragnet-development channel.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme, indicating a structured board reference rather than a bare identifier.
The filename is derived directly from the attachment id.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with stable id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp fields.
Attachment files are named after their id under channel-memory/channel_attachments.
External entities are referenced via URI-style identifiers.
concerns: The file body provides no content or context beyond the linkage.
The semantics of board_items and the board:// scheme are not defined locally.
notes: This is a lightweight pointer file that records when and how an attachment was tied to a specific board item.
questions: What does attachment_type board_items signify beyond a link to a board item?
What data lives at board://item-03672d3f and how is it resolved?
Is the added timestamp authoritative for ordering or only for audit?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as a link record between a channel attachment and a board item, and its content matches that purpose.
apparent_themes: Traceability of attachments to board items
intention_signals: It seems intended to persist a lightweight, discoverable association between a channel attachment and a board item so that channel memory can be navigated by board references.
novelty: The target is expressed as a board:// URI rather than a bare identifier.
contribution: It contributes a durable, file-based record of an attachment-to-board-item association within the dragnet-development channel, enabling traversal from attachments to board items by id and timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that associates attachment att-e6b68956 in the dragnet-development channel with board item item-03672d3f as a board_items attachment, recorded at 2026-06-24T15:14:06Z.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference from a channel attachment to a board item for later lookup and navigation.
